meeting notes jan 15 2025
attendees: alice, bob, carol
location: conference room b

agenda
- review project plan
- discuss blockers
- next steps

discussion
the team reviewed progress on the data pipeline. alice noted that the schema migration is complete. bob raised a concern about performance under high load. carol confirmed the deployment timeline remains on track.

action items
alice will update the project plan by friday
bob needs to profile the query performance and report back next week
carol will schedule the deployment for saturday morning

next meeting: jan 22 at 10am
